ddls:
CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "iteration_name" TEXT /* Name of the iteration (e.g., pos_Overall_Iter#0) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the iteration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the iteration */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used in the iteration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the iteration (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration to which the metric belongs */,
  "true_positives" INTEGER /* Number of true positive predictions */,
  "false_positives" INTEGER /* Number of false positive predictions */,
  "true_negatives" INTEGER /* Number of true negative predictions */,
  "false_negatives" INTEGER /* Number of false negative predictions */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall metric value */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision metric value */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity metric value */,
  "specificity" REAL /* Specificity metric value */,
  "f_measure" REAL /* F-measure metric value */,
  "num_features" INTEGER /* Number of features used in the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy metric value */,
  "cohens_kappa" REAL /* Cohen's kappa coefficient value */,
  "mcc" REAL /* Matthews correlation coefficient (MCC) value */,
  "mean_squared_error" REAL /* Mean squared error value */,
  "mean_absolute_error" REAL /* Mean absolute error value */,
  "mean_absolute_percentage_error" REAL /* Mean absolute percentage error value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration to which the feature belongs */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the feature (e.g., dataset, external source) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead researcher, data scientist) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution to which the researcher belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration to which the project belongs */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration to which the dataset belongs */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., external source, internal database) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration to which the report belongs */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the iteration or report */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration being accessed */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the iteration or report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model parameter */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration to which the model parameter belongs */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the model parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the model parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_architectures" (
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model architecture */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration to which the model architecture belongs */,
  "architecture_name" TEXT /* Name of the model architecture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model architecture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("architecture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_architectures_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)
